text:
ダーカー異常発生の原因……
一体何なんでしょう？

今回の探索で、少しでも手掛かりが
つかめるといいんですけど……

ううん、弱気はだめでした！
<%me>さん
行きましょう

What in the universe is causing the Falspawn
to appear like this?

I hope we can find some kind of clue on this
expedition, but I'm not sure we can...

No, no, this is no time to be pessimistic!
Let's go, <%me>!
